name: cognitive-deadlift
description: Codex skills, Claude skills, Gemini instructions, hooks, and plugins that keep AI-assisted developers thinking.

skills.name: problem-framing
skills.purpose: Define the real problem before implementation.

skills.name: alternatives-before-code
skills.purpose: Compare solution paths before writing code.

skills.name: failing-test-first
skills.purpose: Prove the bug or behavior before fixing it.

skills.name: trace-the-code
skills.purpose: Follow the existing execution path before changing it.

skills.name: read-the-docs-first
skills.purpose: Check docs, ADRs, schemas, and source references before guessing.

skills.name: explain-without-ai
skills.purpose: Require a plain-language explanation before merge or handoff.

skills.name: diff-interrogation
skills.purpose: Review generated or human diffs as untrusted code.

skills.name: debugging-lab-notebook
skills.purpose: Reproduce, hypothesize, instrument, and verify hard bugs.

skills.name: complexity-budget
skills.purpose: Challenge unnecessary abstraction and dependency creep.
